subject: biologi
rules: No raw OCR text or long textbook excerpts in public repository artifacts.
No absolute local paths; use private-source://pdfer/... for private evidence references.
No student data, PINs, cookies, KV keys, import apply output, production secrets or classroom identifiers.
Source QA and render QA must remain separate artifacts.
A SourceClaim can become accepted only after exact page/locator evidence is reviewed.
Question, KnowledgePoint, QKL, pixel binding and image generation are blocked until accepted lineage exists.
Firecrawl may only be used for public unauthenticated metadata such as publisher TOC pages.
